mapper.insert: insert into user_resume( user_id, gender, id_card, birth_date, nation, political_status, marital_status, native_place, current_city, highest_education, graduate_school, department, major, education_type, school_system, foreign_level, job_city, expected_position, skills, project_experience, self_evalution) values( #{userId}, #{gender}, #{idCard}, #{birthDate}, #{nation}, #{politicalStatus}, #{maritalStatus}, #{nativePlace}, #{currentCity}, #{highestEducation}, #{graduateSchool}, #{department}, #{major}, #{educationType}, #{schoolSystem}, #{foreignLevel}, #{jobCity}, #{expectedPosition}, #{skills}, #{projectExperience}, #{selfEvalution})
mapper.update: update user_resume set user_id = #{userId}, gender = #{gender}, id_card = #{idCard}, birth_date = #{birthDate}, nation = #{nation}, political_status = #{politicalStatus}, marital_status = #{maritalStatus}, native_place = #{nativePlace}, current_city = #{currentCity}, highest_education = #{highestEducation}, graduate_school = #{graduateSchool}, department = #{department}, major = #{major}, education_type = #{educationType}, school_system = #{schoolSystem}, foreign_level = #{foreignLevel}, job_city = #{jobCity}, expected_position = #{expectedPosition}, skills = #{skills}, project_experience = #{projectExperience}, self_evalution = #{selfEvalution} where id = #{id}
